---
title: "Now"
description: "What Mike Konczal is working on, reading, and thinking about — a running log."
---

::: {.mk-now-archive}

[← Back to mikekonczal.com](index.html#now){.mk-now-back}

A running log of what I'm working on, reading, and thinking about, newest first. Each entry has its own link. Inspired by [nownownow.com](https://nownownow.com/about).

{{< include _now-entries.qmd >}}

:::

```{=html}
<script>
(function () {
  var wrap = document.querySelector(".mk-now-archive");
  if (!wrap) return;
  var entries = Array.prototype.slice.call(wrap.querySelectorAll(".mk-now-entry"));
  if (!entries.length) return;
  var months = ["January","February","March","April","May","June","July","August",
                "September","October","November","December"];
  // Newest first.
  entries.sort(function (a, b) {
    return (b.getAttribute("data-date") || "").localeCompare(a.getAttribute("data-date") || "");
  });
  entries.forEach(function (el) {
    el.hidden = false;                       // archive shows every entry
    var d = el.getAttribute("data-date") || "";
    var p = d.split("-");
    var id = el.id || ("now-" + d);
    el.id = id;
    // Prepend a clickable date header (the per-entry permalink).
    var h = document.createElement("h2");
    h.className = "mk-now-entry__date";
    var a = document.createElement("a");
    a.href = "#" + id;
    a.textContent = (months[parseInt(p[1], 10) - 1] || "") + " " + (p[0] || "");
    h.appendChild(a);
    el.insertBefore(h, el.firstChild);
    wrap.appendChild(el);                     // enforce newest-first DOM order
  });
  // Re-scroll once the date headers exist, so a deep link lands cleanly.
  if (location.hash) {
    var t = document.getElementById(location.hash.slice(1));
    if (t) t.scrollIntoView({ block: "start" });
  }
})();
</script>
```
